---
title: "Software"
---

## mediationverse

A unified R ecosystem for mediation analysis, providing tools for model fitting, effect sizes, confidence intervals, sensitivity analysis, and simulation.

[![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-mediationverse-blue?logo=github)](https://github.com/Data-Wise/mediationverse)
[![Docs](https://img.shields.io/badge/Docs-Website-green)](https://data-wise.github.io/mediationverse)

### Installation

```r
# Install the entire ecosystem
pak::pak("data-wise/mediationverse")

# Load all packages
library(mediationverse)
```

### Package Ecosystem

{{< include _generated/mediationverse-status.md >}}

### Quick Example

```r
library(mediationverse)

# Fit mediation models
fit_m <- lm(Mediator ~ Treatment + Covariates, data = mydata)
fit_y <- lm(Outcome ~ Treatment + Mediator + Covariates, data = mydata)

# Extract mediation data
med_data <- extract_mediation(fit_m, fit_y, 
                               treatment = "Treatment", 
                               mediator = "Mediator")

# Compute effects
effects <- compute_effects(med_data)
ci <- ci_mediation(med_data, type = "distribution-of-product")
sensitivity <- sensitivity_analysis(med_data)
```

---

## RMediation (CRAN)

Standalone package for computing confidence intervals for mediated effects using the distribution-of-product method.

[![CRAN](https://www.r-pkg.org/badges/version/RMediation)](https://cran.r-project.org/package=RMediation)
[![Downloads](https://cranlogs.r-pkg.org/badges/grand-total/RMediation)](https://cran.r-project.org/package=RMediation)

```r
install.packages("RMediation")
library(RMediation)

# Compute CI for indirect effect
medci(mu.x = 0.5, mu.y = 0.3, 
      se.x = 0.1, se.y = 0.1, 
      type = "dop")
```

---

## Other Tools

A hub-and-spoke toolchain for research and development workflows: [**atlas**](https://github.com/Data-Wise/atlas) is the state hub (projects, sessions, captures); [**flow-cli**](https://github.com/Data-Wise/flow-cli) is the fast shell wrapper around it; the rest are independent spokes.

::: {.tool-group}
::: {.tool-group-label}
Hub & Spoke Core
:::
::: {.tool-grid}
<div class="tool-card"><i class="bi bi-diagram-3"></i><div class="tool-body"><span class="tool-name"><a href="https://github.com/Data-Wise/atlas">atlas</a></span><span class="tool-desc">State engine hub: projects, sessions, captures, breadcrumbs (<code>atlas doctor</code>, <code>project list --kind</code>)</span><span class="tool-lang">Node.js</span></div></div>
<div class="tool-card"><i class="bi bi-diagram-3"></i><div class="tool-body"><span class="tool-name"><a href="https://github.com/Data-Wise/flow-cli">flow-cli</a></span><span class="tool-desc">Fast (&lt;10ms) ZSH shell wrapper for atlas; ADHD-optimized commands (<code>work</code>, <code>dash</code>)</span><span class="tool-lang">ZSH</span></div></div>
<div class="tool-card"><i class="bi bi-diagram-3"></i><div class="tool-body"><span class="tool-name"><a href="https://github.com/Data-Wise/obsidian-cli-ops">obsidian-cli-ops</a></span><span class="tool-desc">Obsidian vault automation; renders a deterministic research board from atlas state (<code>obs research board</code>)</span><span class="tool-lang">Python/Node</span></div></div>
:::
:::

::: {.tool-group}
::: {.tool-group-label}
Claude Code Plugins
:::
::: {.tool-grid}
<div class="tool-card"><i class="bi bi-puzzle"></i><div class="tool-body"><span class="tool-name"><a href="https://github.com/Data-Wise/craft">craft</a></span><span class="tool-desc">Claude Code plugin: commands, skills, and agents for dev workflows</span><span class="tool-lang">JS/ZSH plugin</span></div></div>
<div class="tool-card"><i class="bi bi-puzzle"></i><div class="tool-body"><span class="tool-name"><a href="https://github.com/Data-Wise/rforge">rforge</a></span><span class="tool-desc">Claude Code plugin for R-package ecosystem authoring</span><span class="tool-lang">R + plugin</span></div></div>
<div class="tool-card"><i class="bi bi-puzzle"></i><div class="tool-body"><span class="tool-name"><a href="https://github.com/Data-Wise/scholar">scholar</a></span><span class="tool-desc">Claude plugin for statistical teaching (exams, quizzes, slides, lectures, courses)</span><span class="tool-lang">Claude plugin</span></div></div>
<div class="tool-card"><i class="bi bi-puzzle"></i><div class="tool-body"><span class="tool-name"><a href="https://github.com/Data-Wise/himalaya-mcp">himalaya-mcp</a></span><span class="tool-desc">MCP server wrapping the himalaya email CLI</span><span class="tool-lang">TypeScript</span></div></div>
:::
:::

::: {.tool-group}
::: {.tool-group-label}
Standalone CLIs & Apps
:::
::: {.tool-grid}
<div class="tool-card"><i class="bi bi-terminal"></i><div class="tool-body"><span class="tool-name"><a href="https://github.com/Data-Wise/nexus-cli">nexus-cli</a></span><span class="tool-desc">Knowledge-workflow CLI for academic researchers</span><span class="tool-lang">Python</span></div></div>
<div class="tool-card"><i class="bi bi-terminal"></i><div class="tool-body"><span class="tool-name"><a href="https://github.com/Data-Wise/aiterm">aiterm</a></span><span class="tool-desc">AI terminal optimizer CLI for Claude Code / OpenCode / Gemini CLI</span><span class="tool-lang">Node.js</span></div></div>
<div class="tool-card"><i class="bi bi-terminal"></i><div class="tool-body"><span class="tool-name"><a href="https://github.com/Data-Wise/scribe-sw">scribe-sw</a></span><span class="tool-desc">Distraction-free writer (macOS-native rewrite of <code>scribe</code>)</span><span class="tool-lang">Swift</span></div></div>
:::
:::

::: {.tool-group}
::: {.tool-group-label}
Distribution & Docs
:::
::: {.tool-grid}
<div class="tool-card"><i class="bi bi-box-seam"></i><div class="tool-body"><span class="tool-name"><a href="https://github.com/Data-Wise/dtslides">dtslides</a></span><span class="tool-desc">reveal.js presentation themes</span><span class="tool-lang">Quarto extension</span></div></div>
<div class="tool-card"><i class="bi bi-box-seam"></i><div class="tool-body"><span class="tool-name"><a href="https://github.com/Data-Wise/homebrew-tap">homebrew-tap</a></span><span class="tool-desc"><code>brew tap data-wise/tap</code> — distributes the above tools</span><span class="tool-lang">Ruby</span></div></div>
<div class="tool-card"><i class="bi bi-box-seam"></i><div class="tool-body"><span class="tool-name"><a href="https://github.com/Data-Wise/emacs-r-devkit">emacs-r-devkit</a></span><span class="tool-desc">Emacs configuration for R development</span><span class="tool-lang">Emacs Lisp</span></div></div>
<div class="tool-card"><i class="bi bi-box-seam"></i><div class="tool-body"><span class="tool-name"><a href="https://github.com/Data-Wise/docs-standards">docs-standards</a></span><span class="tool-desc">Shared documentation standards</span><span class="tool-lang">Docs</span></div></div>
:::
:::

Together, atlas + obsidian-cli-ops form a **[Research-Ops Platform](research-ops.qmd)** — `.STATUS` → registry → live Obsidian board.

---

*All software is open source. Contributions welcome!*
